NOTE: All these planets may be in a particulars sign or Moon,
Mars may be in adjoining signs of saturn-or in Train aspect. And
according to degress of the position of planets, the native,
sometimes may work for considerable long time in a place or for
a short Time(d epending on the horosecope). changes in career
are indicated, jumping carrer is indicated.
Following are some of the examples of how career takes its course
[it's various changes.]
